Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xE000 "SURVIVOR-0400-E000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$3d sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Survivor.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0400 which turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts.
